days_3.rest_between_days: Always rest at least 1 day between sessions

cardio_recommendations.fat_loss: Add 20-30 min of moderate cardio (walking, cycling, rowing) on non-lifting days.
cardio_recommendations.muscle_gain: Keep cardio minimal (2x/week, low-intensity) to avoid impeding muscle growth.
cardio_recommendations.strength: Limit cardio to short low-intensity sessions to preserve strength adaptation.
